name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Flat
description: Button set with solid styling without border, glow, or heavy depth.

name: Shadow
description: Button set with elevated styling that relies on drop-shadow depth.

name: Outline
description: Button set with transparent or low-fill styling with a strong outline treatment.

name: Neobrutalism
description: Button set with high-contrast neobrutalist styling with hard edges and bold outlines.

name: With icon
description: Button set with icon-plus-label actions for clearer intent cues.

name: Icon only
description: Button set with icon-only circular and square controls without label text.

name: Sizes
description: Button set with size scale examples for small, medium, and large controls.

name: Pill
description: Button set with fully rounded pill shape for compact labels or actions.

name: Button Group
description: Button set with segmented grouped actions displayed as a unified control.

name: Loading
description: Button set with loading states with spinners and disabled interaction feedback.

name: Gradient
description: Button set with gradient-filled actions for visual prominence.

name: Glassmorphism
description: Button set with translucent glass-style surfaces with blur and layered depth.
